stats_fallback.christened: No traditional christening. Float-out ceremony godmother: Giuliana Rindone (Fincantieri shipyard employee), 8 February 2019. Jennifer Lopez was later appointed fleet-wide 'Chief Entertainment and Lifestyle Officer' (March 2022) — NOT a ship godmother.
stats_fallback.maiden_voyage: Originally planned 1 April 2020 (cancelled by COVID). First revenue sailings August 2021: six 'Summer Soirée' short cruises from Portsmouth, UK. Official Caribbean 'MerMaiden' voyage departed PortMiami on 6 October 2021 (4-night round-trip to Nassau and Bimini).
stats_fallback.cabins_note: 1,408 cabins with 86% balcony, 93% oceanview, ~30 ADA/accessible cabins. Step-out balcony on every balcony cabin. Yellow Leaf hammocks on balconies. European king beds. Peek-a-Boo showers.
stats_fallback.builder: Fincantieri S.p.A., Sestri Ponente yard (Genoa, Italy) — hull yard number 6287
stats_fallback.environmental: Carbon-neutral operations from day one via Climeon heat-recovery technology plus offsets (per Virgin Voyages delivery press release)
stats_fallback.adults_only_note: Strictly 18+. No children's clubs, no kids' menus, no family staterooms, no waterslides. Adults-only policy has applied since launch and is the central design choice of the Virgin Voyages concept.
stats_fallback.all_included: Fares include all 20+ restaurants and cafés (no cover charges), all gratuities, basic WiFi, still/sparkling water, non-pressed juices, sodas, and group fitness classes.

related.class_notes: Lady Class. Scarlet Lady is the LEAD SHIP of Virgin Voyages' four-ship Lady Class, all built by Fincantieri at its Sestri Ponente yard in Genoa. Sisters: Valiant Lady (delivered 1 July 2021, yard 6288), Resilient Lady (delivered 7 December 2022 after an 11-month delay, yard 6289), and Brilliant Lady (formally delivered February 2024 but entered commercial service 5 September 2025 after an 18-month warm lay-up off Cyprus/Civitavecchia/Málaga, yard 6304). All four share the Mille platform (a Fincantieri design lineage), with identical 110,000 GT / 2,770 guests / 1,160 crew / 1,408 cabins / 38 m beam / 277 m length specs. Brilliant Lady is the only sister with an adapted frame that allows Panama Canal transit, enabling her West Coast and Alaska deployment. Scarlet Lady's unique venue is the Lucky Lotus by Razzle Dazzle Chinese evening concept.

deployment.current_2026_04: Year-round Caribbean round-trips from PortMiami (Bimini Beach Club, Cozumel, Key West, Puerto Plata Amber Cove, Nassau). April 2026 schedule: 5-night rounds on Apr 5 and Apr 10; 14-night transatlantic repositioning to Barcelona departs 26 April 2026 via Las Palmas (Gran Canaria), Casablanca, and Alicante.
deployment.2026_summer: Western Mediterranean, British Isles, Iceland, and Morocco itineraries from Barcelona and Portsmouth, UK.
historic_homeports: Portsmouth UK (2021 Summer Soirée debut + subsequent UK seasons)

history.steel_cutting: 22 March 2017 at Fincantieri Sestri Ponente, Genoa
history.float_out: 8 February 2019 — float-out ceremony godmother Giuliana Rindone (Fincantieri shipyard employee)
history.delivered: 14 February 2020 at Fincantieri Sestri Ponente (formally presented 13 February 2020)
history.covid_cancellation: Originally planned maiden voyage 1 April 2020 — cancelled by the COVID-19 pandemic.
history.first_revenue_sailings: August 2021 — six short 'Summer Soirée Series' cruises from Portsmouth, UK (no traditional maiden voyage was held)
history.caribbean_mermaiden: 6 October 2021 — 4-night round-trip PortMiami to Nassau and Bimini, the ship's official 'MerMaiden Voyage'
history.2022_03_jlo_appointment: March 2022 — Virgin Voyages appointed Jennifer Lopez as fleet-wide 'Chief Entertainment and Lifestyle Officer' (a brand-partnership title, NOT a ship godmother role)
history.2024_11_refurbishment: November 2024 — minor stateroom and suite refresh (per CruiseMapper)
history.2025_02_fifth_anniversary: 13 February 2025 — fifth anniversary of delivery (Cruise Industry News retrospective)

discrepancies_flagged.imo_was_tbd: Previous page had IMO 'TBD' in data-imo, stats-fallback, and live tracker. Correct IMO is 9804801 per VesselFinder, MarineTraffic, CruiseMapper, FleetMon, and Maritime Database (five independent sources agree).
discrepancies_flagged.class_name_wrong: Previous stats JSON said 'Virgin Class'. Virgin Voyages' own in-house class name is 'Lady Class' (a play on 'your ladyship'). Fixed throughout.
discrepancies_flagged.title_leak: Previous page had 'Scarlet Lady — Virgin Voyages | In the Wake' as the ship name in multiple places, including data-ship attribute, Review JSON-LD, deck plans heading, FAQ heading, stats fallback name, and ship-map data-ship. This leaked the site name into the ship name (validator title-leak error #1324). Fixed throughout to just 'Scarlet Lady'.
discrepancies_flagged.launch_year_wrong: Previous page variously claimed the ship 'launched in 2021' or 'entered service in 2020'. Correct framing: formally delivered 14 February 2020; maiden voyage cancelled by COVID-19; first revenue sailings in August 2021 from Portsmouth; Caribbean MerMaiden on 6 October 2021. All three dates are accurate in different senses; the page now states all of them.
discrepancies_flagged.main_dining_room_hallucination: Previous FAQ said Scarlet Lady offers 'the main dining room and buffet'. BOTH statements are WRONG. Virgin Voyages has no main dining room and no buffet on any ship — that is the core of the Virgin Voyages concept. Scarlet Lady has 20+ included restaurants instead.
discrepancies_flagged.under_construction_banner_removed: Previous page had a 'Page Under Construction' card with placeholder text 'Full ship details, deck plans, dining guides, and live tracker coming soon.' This triggered validator #9br. Removed.
discrepancies_flagged.wrong_dining_hero_image: Previous page loaded /assets/img/Cordelia_Empress_Food_Court.webp as the dining hero. Cordelia is a different Indian cruise line — not Virgin Voyages. Removed.
discrepancies_flagged.icp_lite_upgraded: Previous content-protocol was 'ICP-Lite v1.4'. Upgraded to ICP-2 throughout, including FAQ JSON-LD rewrite with ship-specific answers.
discrepancies_flagged.footer_year_2025: Previous footer showed '© 2025 In the Wake'. Updated to auto-year with 2026 noscript fallback.
discrepancies_flagged.no_godmother_invention: Page now explicitly states Scarlet Lady has no traditional godmother and that JLo is NOT a ship godmother (she is fleet-wide 'Chief Entertainment and Lifestyle Officer'). Float-out godmother Giuliana Rindone (Fincantieri employee) is correctly credited as a shipyard-ceremony figure.
discrepancies_flagged.no_cirque: Virgin Voyages has never had Cirque du Soleil. Confirmed in class-wide FAQ.
